title: Looting the Village (NLAM)
description: Villager trade loot tables for supporting other datapacks.
body:
# ![Looting the Village](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7613ca15f50a91d53ec20e5448577b8524e47fc0.png)
No longer actively maintained.
# Purpose
This is just a bunch of loot tables based on the 1.20 villager trades. Since this datapack only contains loot tables, it is intended to be used as a support pack for other datapacks and/or mods.

# Directions for Use
1. Install datapack.
2. Implement a datapack that utilises these loot tables.

# Notes
Any notes (fork basis, details, etc.).

# Known Issues
- Explorer maps do not generate properly in most cases.

# Support and Links
## Bug Reporting and Update Notifications
To report bugs and to keep up to date with new versions and additional packs from me, please join our [Discord](https://discord.gg/bK92yTbxj3).

## Links
Check out my other packs on [Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/user/Artecie).

Help support ongoing development at [Patreon](https://www.patreon.com/artecie) or [Ko-Fi](https://ko-fi.com/artecie).

Watch development (generally troubleshooting) and gameplay with the packs in use on my [Twitch Channel](https://twitch.tv/artecie).
